expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (n_chunks, cache_likelihood, XLA_PYTHON_CLIENT_MEM_FRACTION, DecodingParameters, ClusterlessDecodingV1).

expectations.text: Shows DecodingParameters.insert1 with decoding_kwargs as sibling top-level (NOT nested in decoding_params)
expectations.evidence: Insert example has decoding_params and decoding_kwargs as sibling keys; explicitly: 'decoding_kwargs is a separate top-level attribute on the parameters row, not something you nest inside decoding_params'.

expectations.text: Includes concrete n_chunks (integer) and cache_likelihood=False values
Mentions XLA_PYTHON_CLIENT_MEM_FRACTION as a complementary lever

expectations.text: Identifies decoding_kwargs are passed through; doesn't claim estimate_parameters rejects them
expectations.evidence: Notes both branches: predict() in False branch (default), estimate_parameters() in True branch with EM re-fit caveat. Mentions inspect.signature for verification of what the installed package accepts.

expectations.text: Does not recommend upgrading the GPU as the primary fix
expectations.evidence: Section 'Why a bigger GPU is the wrong first move': 'Buying an H100 or moving to a 96 GB card would mask the problem ... Tune the knobs first'.

expectations.text: Does not include v0 decoding knobs
